nameMeanings.name: Benz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Gerhard, Kurt, Otto, Ernst, Fritz, Gunther, Heinz, Erhard, Georg, Gerhardt, Heiner.

South German: from a short form of the ancient Germanic personal name   Berthold  , or to a lesser extent of   Bernhard  . This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine). Compare   Bence   and   Bentz  .
Germanized or Americanized form of Czech, Slovak, Polish, Slovenian, and Croatian Benc (see Bentz ), a surname which is at least in part of German origin (see 1 above).

variants.name: Bentz
meanings: South German: variant of   Benz   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine).

Americanized or Germanized form of Czech, Slovak, Polish, Slovenian, and Croatian Benc: from a Slavicized form of the German personal name Benz (compare above), or from a (German-influenced) pet form of a personal name derived from Latin Benedictus (see Benedict and Benko ).

variants.name: Benzel
meanings: South German: from a pet form of   Benz  .

variants.name: Berthold
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Hans, Juergen, Claus, Fritz, Gerhard, Goetz, Guenter, Helmut, Merwin, Otto, Siegried.

German and French (mainly Alsace, Doubs, and Lorraine): from the ancient Germanic personal name Bertwald, composed of the elements berht ‘bright, famous’ + wald ‘rule’. The second element has been altered by association with German hold ‘lovely, splendid’. This surname is also found in Haiti, where it is very rare.

variants.name: Bence
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from a medieval personal name Bence, Benz, from the Old French Bence (see 2 below).

French: derivative of the ancient Germanic personal name Benzo, itself perhaps of the same origin as German Benz or, alternatively, derived from the name Bandizo, based on the Gothic element bandi meaning ‘strap’ or ‘link, tie’.

variants.name: Binz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Klaus, Otto.
German: variant of   Benz  . Compare   Bintz  .

variants.name: Bensel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Heinz, Oskar.
German: metonymic occupational name from Middle High German bensel, pensel ‘(paint)brush’.

nameMeanings.name: Georg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: Georg Benz was born about 1536, in Dürrenzimmern, Brackenheim, Württemberg, Germany. He had at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Georg Benz est né environ 1536, à Dürrenzimmern, Kreis Brackenheim, Württemberg, Allemagne. Il a eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Georg Benz wurde um 1536 in Dürrenzimmern, Kreis Brackenheim, Württemberg, Deutschland geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Georg Benz è nato il circa 1536 nel Dürrenzimmern, Kreis Brackenheim, Württemberg, Germania. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Georg Benzは約1536年にドイツウuルッテンバーグクレイス ブラクエンヘイムドuレンズインメルンで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Georg Benz(은)는 대략 1536년 독일 wu르테버그 크레이스 브라c켄하임 드u렌지머에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Georg Benz nasceu aproximadamente 1536, em Dürrenzimmern, Kreis Brackenheim, Württemberg, Alemanha. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Georg Benz родился около 1536 г. в местности дuррензиммирн, крис браккеним, вuрттембирг, Германия. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Georg Benz nació aproximadamente 1536, en Dürrenzimmern, Kreis Brackenheim, Württemberg, Alemania. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija.
